meta.title: The 90-Day Revenue Partnership
meta.description: Architect, Install, and Scale your Revenue Engine in 90 days or less.

hero.title: We Don't Just Advise. We Architect.
hero.subtitle: Join the 90-Day Partnership to install a permanent, scalable Revenue Engine into your business.

tiers.name: The Blueprint
tiers.subtitle: Do It Yourself
tiers.description: Full access to our Revenue Architecture curriculum and templates. Build it at your own pace.

tiers.name: The Accelerator
tiers.subtitle: Done With You
tiers.description: Join a cohort of founders building alongside you. Weekly live coaching and direct feedback.

tiers.name: The Installation
tiers.subtitle: Done For You
tiers.description: We embed into your team and build the engine for you. Limited to 2 partners per quarter.

timeline.title: The 90-Day Roadmap
timeline.description: From chaos to clarity in 12 weeks.

curriculum.title: The Revenue Audit
curriculum.description: Deconstruct your current performance. Identify leaks. Set specific KPI targets for the program.

curriculum.title: Avatar & Offer Alignment
curriculum.description: Ensure you are selling the right thing to the right person. Refine your value proposition.

curriculum.title: Tech Stack Installation
curriculum.description: Setup CRM, Automation, and Data Analytics. No more spreadsheets.

curriculum.title: Inbound Engine Construction
curriculum.description: Building the content and ad assets that drive awareness at scale.

curriculum.title: Outbound Systems
curriculum.description: Cold outreach that actually works. Scripting, list building, and sending.

curriculum.title: Sales Process Engineering
curriculum.description: Scripting the perfect demo. Handling objections. Closing frameworks.

curriculum.title: Nurture Sequences
curriculum.description: Automated email and SMS flows to convert mid-funnel leads.

curriculum.title: Talent & Delegation
curriculum.description: How to hire your first SDR or Account Executive.

curriculum.title: The Growth Sprint
curriculum.description: Aggressive execution. We turn up the volume and optimize live campaigns.
